name: _FindPESectionExec
asm:
0x140002670      MOV      R8, qword ptr [0x140004460]
  0x140002677      XOR      EAX, EAX
  0x140002679      CMP      word ptr [R8], 0x5a4d
  0x14000267F      JNZ      0x140002690
  0x140002681      MOVSXD   RDX, dword ptr [R8 + 0x3c]
  0x140002685      ADD      RDX, R8
  0x140002688      CMP      dword ptr [RDX], 0x4550
  0x14000268E      JZ       0x140002698
  0x140002690      RET      
  0x140002698      CMP      word ptr [RDX + 0x18], 0x20b
  0x14000269E      JNZ      0x140002690
  0x1400026A0      MOVZX    R8D, word ptr [RDX + 0x6]
  0x1400026A5      TEST     R8W, R8W
  0x1400026A9      JZ       0x140002690
  0x1400026AB      MOVZX    EAX, word ptr [RDX + 0x14]
  0x1400026AF      LEA      RAX, [RDX + RAX*0x1 + 0x18]
  0x1400026B4      LEA      EDX, [R8 + -0x1]
  0x1400026B8      LEA      RDX, [RDX + RDX*0x4]
  0x1400026BC      LEA      RDX, [RAX + RDX*0x8 + 0x28]
  0x1400026C1      NOP      dword ptr [RAX]

  0x1400026D0      TEST     byte ptr [RAX + 0x27], 0x20
  0x1400026D4      JZ       0x1400026df
  0x1400026D6      TEST     RCX, RCX
  0x1400026D9      JZ       0x140002690
  0x1400026DB      SUB      RCX, 0x1
  0x1400026DF      ADD      RAX, 0x28
  0x1400026E3      CMP      RDX, RAX
  0x1400026E6      JNZ      0x1400026d0

  0x1400026EA      RET
